overrides.expect: \begin{array}{r l} & {\int_ {- \infty} ^ {\infty} d ^ {4} k f (k) \frac {1}{k ^ {2} - \lambda^ {2} + i \epsilon} \frac {1}{(p ^ {\prime} - k) ^ {2} - m ^ {2} + i \epsilon} \frac {1}{(p - k) ^ {2} - m ^ {2} + i \epsilon}} \\ & {\quad = 2 \int_ {0} ^ {\infty} \int_ {0} ^ {\infty} \int_ {0} ^ {\infty} d z _ {1} d z _ {2} d z _ {3} \delta (1 - z _ {1} - z _ {2} - z _ {3})} \\ & {\qquad \times \int_ {- \infty} ^ {\infty} \frac {d ^ {4} k f (k)}{[ k ^ {2} - 2 k \cdot p ^ {\prime} z _ {2} - 2 k \cdot p z _ {3} - \lambda^ {2} z _ {1} + (p ^ {\prime 2} - m ^ {2}) z _ {2} + (p ^ {2} - m ^ {2}) z _ {3} + i \epsilon ] ^ {3}}} \\ & {\quad = 2 \int_ {0} ^ {\infty} \int_ {0} ^ {\infty} \int_ {0} ^ {\infty} d z _ {1} d z _ {2} d z _ {3} \delta (1 - z _ {1} - z _ {2} - z _ {3}) \int_ {- \infty} ^ {\infty} \frac {d ^ {4} k f (k + p ^ {\prime} z _ {2} + p z _ {3})}{(k ^ {2} - c + i \epsilon) ^ {3}}} \\ & {\text {with c\equiv (p^{\prime} z_{2} +pz_{3})\cdot(p^{\prime} z_{2} +pz_{3})+ \lambda^{2} z_{1} -(p^{\prime 2}-m^{2})z_{2} -(p^{2}-m^{2})z_{3}}} \\ & {\qquad = - p ^ {\prime 2} z _ {2} (1 - z _ {2}) - p ^ {2} z _ {3} (1 - z _ {3}) + 2 p \cdot p ^ {\prime} z _ {2} z _ {3} + m ^ {2} (1 - z _ {1}) + \lambda^ {2} z _ {1}} \\ & {\qquad = - (p ^ {\prime 2} - m ^ {2}) z _ {2} (1 - z _ {2}) - (p ^ {2} - m ^ {2}) z _ {3} (1 - z _ {3}) - q ^ {2} z _ {2} z _ {3}} \\ & {\qquad \qquad \qquad \qquad \qquad \qquad \qquad \qquad \qquad \qquad \qquad \qquad \qquad \qquad \qquad \qquad \qquad \qquad + m ^ {2} (1 - z _ {1}) ^ {2} + \lambda^ {2} z _ {1}} \end{array}
